content:
Hi, my beloved friends! 🤗 Today, I’m not going to teach you Angular.
I’m not going to explain Signals. I’m not going to discuss Standalone Components. And I’m definitely not going to show another CRUD example.
😄 Instead, I want to share something that has improved my productivity more than any Angular feature released in the last few years. It’s not a new framework. It’s not another AI tool.
It’s simply learning “how to talk to AI like a software engineer.” That one skill has saved me countless hours while building Angular applications.
If you’ve ever spent hours debugging an issue that had nothing to do with your business logic… This article is surely for you.
So, what exactly changed?
It wasn’t ChatGPT.
It wasn’t Claude.
It wasn’t Cursor.
It wasn’t even Angular 22.
The only thing that changed was “how I communicated with AI.”
Instead of asking vague questions, I started giving AI context.
I stopped asking it to “write code”.
